title: The Haunting at Jack the Ripper's House
original_title: The Haunting at Jack the Ripper’s House
overview: A group of famous YouTubers known for their paranormal 'ghost hunting' video blogs set out on a mission to end the rumors they're faking their haunts and film their most ambitious video yet.
